description: This file defines a Bootstrap modal component, including its class implementation, event handling, and integration with jQuery. It manages modal display, hiding, focus trapping, backdrop handling, and related UI behaviors.

classes.name: Modal
classes.description: A class representing the Bootstrap modal component, handling show/hide logic, event management, focus trapping, backdrop control, and integration with jQuery.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the modal's visibility based on its current state.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the modal, triggers show events, manages focus, and handles backdrop.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the modal, triggers hide events, releases focus, and manages backdrop.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up event listeners and disposes of modal resources.

methods.name: handleUpdate
methods.description: Adjusts the modal layout, especially for overflowing content.

methods.name: _initializeBackDrop
methods.description: Creates and initializes the backdrop component.

methods.name: _initializeFocusTrap
methods.description: Creates and initializes the focus trap for accessibility.

methods.name: _showElement
methods.description: Handles DOM manipulations to display the modal element.

methods.name: _addEventListeners
methods.description: Sets up event listeners for modal interactions, such as dismiss and resize.

methods.name: _hideModal
methods.description: Performs DOM updates to hide the modal and clean up.

methods.name: _isAnimated
methods.description: Checks if the modal has animation classes applied.

methods.name: _triggerBackdropTransition
methods.description: Handles backdrop transition effects when modal is dismissed.

methods.name: _adjustDialog
methods.description: Adjusts dialog layout for overflowing content and scrollbar presence.

methods.name: _resetAdjustments
methods.description: Resets layout adjustments made for scrollbar compensation.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for the modal component.
